title: O Nanna Chetana 1
author: Kuvempu
verse:
ಓ ನನ್ನ ಚೇತನ,
ಆಗು ನೀ ಅನಿಕೇತನ!
bhavartha: O my spirit, become unbound and limitless!

title: Mankuthimmana Kagga 2
author: D.V.G.
verse:
ವೇದ ಸುಳ್ಳಾದರು ಗಾದೆ ಸುಳ್ಳಾಗದು,
ಮಾತು ಬಲ್ಲವನಿಗೆ ಜಗಳವಿಲ್ಲ,
ಊಟ ಬಲ್ಲವನಿಗೆ ರೋಗವಿಲ್ಲ.
bhavartha: Even if the scriptures turn out to be false, a proverb will never be false. One who knows how to speak avoids quarrels; one who knows how to eat avoids illness.

title: Shravana 3
author: Bendre
verse:
ವೇದ ಸುಳ್ಳಾದರು ಗಾದೆ ಸುಳ್ಳಾಗದು,

bhavartha: Even if the scriptures turn out to be false, a proverb will never be false. One who knows how to speak avoids quarrels; one who knows how to eat avoids illness.

verse:
ವೇದ ಸುಳ್ಳಾದರು ಗಾದೆ ಸುಳ್ಳಾಗದು,
ಮಾತು ಬಲ್ಲವನಿಗೆ ಜಗಳವಿಲ್ಲ,
ಊಟ ಬಲ್ಲವನಿಗೆ ರೋಗವಿಲ್ಲ.
bhavartha: Even if the scriptures turn out to be false, a proverb will never be false. One who knows how to speak avoids quarrels; one who knows how to eat avoids illness.

title: O Nanna Chetana 46
author: Kuvempu
verse:
ಓ ನನ್ನ ಚೇತನ,
ಆಗು ನೀ ಅನಿಕೇತನ!
bhavartha: O my spirit, become unbound and limitless!

title: Mankuthimmana Kagga 47
author: D.V.G.
verse:
ವೇದ ಸುಳ್ಳಾದರು ಗಾದೆ ಸುಳ್ಳಾಗದು,

ಊಟ ಬಲ್ಲವನಿಗೆ ರೋಗವಿಲ್ಲ.
bhavartha: Even if the scriptures turn out to be false, a proverb will never be false. One who knows how to speak avoids quarrels; one who knows how to eat avoids illness.
